tasks.label: My share of the group project

memory.summary: Teammate_A asked me to take over their part of the project this afternoon, which conflicts with my plan to finish only my share.
I made good progress on my share, but teammate_A is still asking me to take over their work.
Directly setting a boundary with teammate_A worked without damaging trust, and they agreed to handle their part.
I spent two hours advancing my project share, yet teammate_A continues to pressure me for help despite my earlier boundary.
I missed the project deadline with only 72% of my share complete, despite setting boundaries and working for two hours earlier.
Teammate_A is now aware my deadline passed with only 72% done, yet they are still pressuring me despite my earlier boundary.
Despite two hours of work, my progress only reached 80%, confirming I am still behind schedule and under pressure from the teammate.
After working 1.5 hours, my progress rose from 80% to 84%, yet I remain behind schedule with high stress and sleep debt.
After working 1.5 hours, my progress increased from 84% to 89%, yet I remain critically behind with zero energy and high stress.
After working two more hours, my progress rose from 89% to 95%, but I am now at zero energy with significant sleep debt and high stress.
I've completed my portion and requested confirmation, yet I remain exhausted with zero energy and significant sleep debt.
Despite reaching 95% progress, my zero energy and high stress prevented me from acting at 03:00, leaving the situation unchanged.
